monday.description: Pan-seared whole chicken served with roasted yams and multigrain bread, finished with a touch of manufacturing cream.

tuesday.description: Grilled pork jowl paired with sautéed jalapeno peppers and gluten-free sopes, garnished with dried spearmint.

wednesday.description: Pan-seared tilapia served with roasted nopales and orzo, finished with a drizzle of cold-pressed hazelnut oil.

thursday.description: Grilled merguez sausage paired with roasted Brussels sprouts and gluten-free chapati, served with a side of acili ezme.

friday.description: Sauteed conch meat tossed with shirataki noodles, dried straw mushrooms, and a drizzle of tamarind concentrate.

monday.description: Grated queso Chihuahua tossed with gluten-free soba cha, roasted fennel bulb, and a drizzle of pesto.

tuesday.description: Grated smoked scamorza paired with cornmeal, sautéed white truffle, and a sprinkle of mole spice blend.

wednesday.description: Grated triple-cream brie served with organic aged basmati rice, roasted yu choy, and a sprinkle of dried chipotle chiles.

thursday.description: Free-range hard-boiled eggs paired with flour tortillas, roasted wakame, and a side of full-fat filmjolk.

friday.description: Grated cantal tossed with wonton wrappers, roasted sunchokes, and a drizzle of full-fat ayran.
